name: tDNA_boundary_cluster_cen1
description: tRNA gene cluster acting as the chromatin boundary at S. pombe centromere 1 (chrI). Pol III transcription of tRNAs at the imr/otr junction blocks heterochromatin spreading from otr into cnt and from cnt into otr. Multiple tRNA paralogs per cluster (tRNA-Ala, tRNA-Gly, tRNA-Pro etc.) with near-identical mature-RNA sequence.
expected_copy_count: 4-10 tRNA genes per boundary cluster (both L and R sides)
